THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALICDEM, MARIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 507 CAPP STREET, ROOM D-2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-04-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT TO PAY PLTF. $619.98 UNPAID RENT, $432.90 DAMAGES AND COST OF SUIT. BUT IF DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 10/4/95, PLTF. WAIVES PAYMENTS BY DEFT OF THESE RENTS/DAMAGES & COSTS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
